title: PaymentTerm

remote_id.description: The third-party API ID of the matching object.

created_at.description: The datetime that this object was created by Merge.

modified_at.description: The datetime that this object was modified by Merge.

name.description: The name of the payment term.

is_active.description: `True` if the payment term is active, `False` if not.

company.description: The subsidiary that the payment term belongs to.

days_until_due.description: The number of days after the invoice date that payment is due.

discount_days.description: The number of days the invoice must be paid before discounts expire.

remote_last_modified_at.description: When the third party's payment term was modified.

description:
# The PaymentTerm Object
### Description
The `PaymentTerm` object is the agreed-upon conditions between a buyer and a seller that define the timing,
amount, and conditions under which payment for goods or services must be made.

### Usage Example
Fetch from the `GET PaymentTerm` endpoint and view payment term information.
